sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: SnapKaza ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our AI-powered property marketing platform.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content: We may collect the following types of information:
list: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and agency details when you register or contact us.
Property Data: Images, videos, and property descriptions you upload for AI processing.
Usage Data: Information about how you interact with our platform, including access times and features used.
Technical Data: IP address, browser type, device information, and cookies.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use collected information to:
list: Provide and improve our AI property marketing services
Process and deliver your transformed visual assets
Communicate with you about your account and services
Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

sections.heading: 4. Data Sharing
sections.content: We may share your information with:
list: Service Providers: Third-party vendors who assist in platform operations
Legal Requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights
Business Transfers: In connection with mergers or acquisitions
sections.suffix: We never sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: 5. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have rights to:

sections.heading: 7. Contact Us
sections.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at

sections.heading: 1. Agreement to Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using SnapKaza's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Services
sections.content: SnapKaza provides AI-powered property marketing services, including but not limited to:

sections.heading: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate information when creating an account.

sections.heading: 4. Content Ownership
list: Your Content: You retain ownership of original images and content you upload.
AI-Generated Content: Upon payment, you receive full commercial rights to AI-generated assets.
Licence: You grant us a licence to process your content for service delivery.

sections.heading: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to:
list: Upload content you don't have rights to use
Use the service for illegal purposes
Attempt to reverse-engineer our AI technology
Resell or redistribute our services without authorisation

sections.heading: 6. Payment Terms
sections.content: Payments are processed securely through our payment providers. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated. Prices may change with notice to users.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: SnapKaza is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the specific service.

sections.heading: 8. Termination
sections.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to our services at any time for violation of these terms. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.

sections.heading: 9. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of England and Wales.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms, please contact us at

sections.heading: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better user experience and understand how our platform is used.

subsections.heading: Essential Cookies
subsections.content: Required for the platform to function properly. These cannot be disabled.

subsections.heading: Analytics Cookies
subsections.content: Help us understand how visitors interact with our platform.

subsections.heading: Marketing Cookies
subsections.content: Used to deliver relevant advertisements (only with your consent).

sections.heading: 3. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies from trusted third-party services including:

sections.heading: 4. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can manage your cookie preferences through:
list: Our cookie consent banner (shown on first visit)
sections.suffix: Note: Disabling certain cookies may affect platform functionality.

sections.heading: 5. Cookie Retention
sections.content: Cookie retention periods vary:
list: Session cookies: Deleted when you close your browser
Persistent cookies: Stored for up to 12 months

sections.heading: 6. Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

sections.heading: 7. Contact Us
sections.content: For questions about our cookie practices, please contact us at

sections.heading: 1. Our Commitment to GDPR
sections.content: SnapKaza is committed to protecting the personal data of our users in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This page outlines how we meet our obligations under EU data protection law.

sections.heading: 2. Data Controller
sections.content: SnapKaza Ltd is the data controller for personal data collected through our platform. Our registered address is in the United Kingdom.

sections.heading: 3. Your Rights Under GDPR
sections.content: As an EU/EEA resident, you have the following rights:

subsections.heading: Right to Access
subsections.content: You can request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.

subsections.heading: Right to Rectification
subsections.content: You can request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.

subsections.heading: Right to Erasure ("Right to be Forgotten")
subsections.content: You can request deletion of your personal data in certain circumstances.

subsections.heading: Right to Restrict Processing
subsections.content: You can request that we limit how we use your data.

subsections.heading: Right to Data Portability
subsections.content: You can request your data in a machine-readable format.

subsections.heading: Right to Object
subsections.content: You can object to certain types of processing, including direct marketing.

subsections.heading: Rights Related to Automated Decision-Making
subsections.content: You have the right not to be subject to decisions based solely on automated processing.

sections.heading: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content: We process personal data based on:
list: Contract: Processing necessary to provide our services
Consent: Where you have given explicit consent
Legitimate Interest: For business operations and service improvement

sections.heading: 5. Data Transfers
sections.content: When we transfer data outside the EU/EEA, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including:

sections.heading: 6. Data Protection Officer
sections.content: For GDPR-related inquiries, you can contact our Data Protection Officer at

sections.heading: 7. Exercising Your Rights
sections.content: To exercise any of your GDPR rights, please contact us at
sections.suffix: We will respond to your request within 30 days.

sections.heading: 8. Supervisory Authority
sections.content: If you are not satisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) in the UK or your local data protection authority.
